g.text: The 50 Hz LFP pickup reaches the GOOD LEC tissue channels, not only the dead ones

text.style: font-size: 10.5px; font-family: 'DejaVu Sans', 'Bitstream Vera Sans', 'Computer Modern Sans Serif', 'Lucida Grande', 'Verdana', 'Geneva', 'Lucid', 'Arial', 'Helvetica', 'Avant Garde', sans-serif

g.text: % of channels above +5: dHPC 0% · LEC tissue-good 34% · LEC dead 53% (▲ = off-scale, to +80)

g.text: All 15 curated LEC units sit on these contaminated good channels (the neurons cluster where the pickup is); dHPC units sit on clean channels. The single-unit effect is NOT driven by this LFP

text.style: font-size: 8.2px; font-family: 'DejaVu Sans', 'Bitstream Vera Sans', 'Computer Modern Sans Serif', 'Lucida Grande', 'Verdana', 'Geneva', 'Lucid', 'Arial', 'Helvetica', 'Avant Garde', sans-serif; fill: #444444

g.text: pickup: spikes are detected >300 Hz, above the 50 Hz band, and the responsive units pass the ACG/ISI artifact screens (e.g. unit 87). Dead/excluded channels are dropped from all analyses.
